requirement_topic.en: NIGELEC Grid Connection — 50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V Settings, Anti-Islanding, and Project Approval
requirement_topic.zh: NIGELEC并网——50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V参数、防孤岛和项目审批
requirement_topic.zht: NIGELEC併網——50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V參數、防孤島和項目審批

summary.en: Grid-tied PV inverters in Niger should be treated as requiring NIGELEC technical connection review and, where generation or electricity sale is regulated, ARSE authorisation or licensing. Niger is a 50 Hz market and the commonly stated low-voltage supply is 220/380 V, so inverter firmware, protection thresholds, reconnection delay, voltage/frequency ride-through behaviour, and anti-islanding functions must be validated against Niger project settings rather than assumed from China factory defaults. In the absence of a publicly confirmed Niger inverter grid code, IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 are the practical evidence set normally requested by engineers, utilities, and donor-financed projects.
summary.zh: 尼日尔并网光伏逆变器应视为需要NIGELEC技术接入审查；涉及受监管发电或售电时，还应处理ARSE授权或许可。尼日尔为50 Hz市场，低压供电通常表述为220/380 V，因此逆变器固件、保护阈值、重连延迟、电压/频率穿越行为和防孤岛功能须按尼日尔项目参数验证，而不能直接沿用中国出厂默认设置。在未确认公开的尼日尔逆变器并网规范情况下，IEC 62116和IEC 61727通常是工程师、公用事业和捐助方融资项目采用的实际证据组合。
summary.zht: 尼日併網光伏逆變器應視為需要NIGELEC技術接入審查；涉及受監管發電或售電時，還應處理ARSE授權或許可。尼日為50 Hz市場，低壓供電通常表述為220/380 V，因此逆變器韌體、保護閾值、重連延遲、電壓/頻率穿越行為和防孤島功能須按尼日項目參數驗證，而不能直接沿用中國出廠預設設置。在未確認公開的尼日逆變器併網規範情況下，IEC 62116和IEC 61727通常是工程師、公用事業和捐助方融資項目採用的實際證據組合。

standards_or_laws: NIGELEC technical connection review for grid-tied projects — project-specific gate
ARSE authorisation or licensing for regulated electricity activities — Niger energy-sector gate
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
Niger low-voltage grid context commonly stated as 220/380 V, 50 Hz

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power-station connection, NB/T 32004 for grid-connected PV inverter technical specifications, and GB/T 37408 for PV grid-connected inverter requirements. These documents are prepared for China grid operators and China conformity programmes. Because Niger approval is controlled by local national conformity, ARSE/NIGELEC project review, and lender specifications, Chinese grid-connection approvals do not create automatic acceptance in Niger even though both markets use 50 Hz and nominal 220/380 V low-voltage settings.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004光伏并网逆变器技术规范，以及GB/T 37408光伏并网逆变器技术要求。这些文件面向中国电网运营商和中国合格评定项目。由于尼日尔验收受当地国家合格评定、ARSE/NIGELEC项目审查和贷款方规格控制，即使两国均使用50 Hz及标称220/380 V低压参数，中国并网批准也不会在尼日尔自动获得接受。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004光伏併網逆變器技術規範，以及GB/T 37408光伏併網逆變器技術要求。這些文件面向中國電網運營商和中國合格評定項目。由於尼日驗收受當地國家合格評定、ARSE/NIGELEC項目審查和貸款方規格控制，即使兩國均使用50 Hz及標稱220/380 V低壓參數，中國併網批准也不會在尼日自動獲得接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China GB/T grid evidence is not a substitute for NIGELEC connection approval or ARSE treatment in Niger. Exporters should prepare a Niger-specific grid-settings file, IEC 62116 anti-islanding report, IEC 61727 utility-interface report, protection-setting schedule, single-line diagram, commissioning test procedure, and evidence that the supplied firmware profile matches the NIGELEC-approved settings. For utility-scale solar and donor-financed projects, confirm any tender-specific grid-code, SCADA, reactive-power, fault-ride-through, and power-quality requirements before shipment.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T并网证据不能替代尼日尔NIGELEC接入批准或ARSE处理。出口商应准备尼日尔专用电网参数文件、IEC 62116防孤岛报告、IEC 61727公用电网接口报告、保护整定表、单线图、调试测试程序，以及所供固件配置与NIGELEC批准参数一致的证据。对于公用事业规模太阳能和捐助方融资项目，出货前须确认招标专用并网规范、SCADA、无功功率、故障穿越和电能质量要求。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T併網證據不能替代尼日NIGELEC接入批准或ARSE處理。出口商應準備尼日專用電網參數文件、IEC 62116防孤島報告、IEC 61727公用電網介面報告、保護整定表、單線圖、調試測試程序，以及所供韌體配置與NIGELEC批准參數一致的證據。對於公用事業規模太陽能和捐助方融資項目，出貨前須確認招標專用併網規範、SCADA、無功功率、故障穿越和電能品質要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-tied projects: NIGELEC connection acceptance and any applicable ARSE authorisation/licence are project gates; IEC evidence is normally required by project engineers or lenders where local rules reference IEC
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China-side grid and certification expectations only; it is not transferable to Niger without local review

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat NIGELEC connection acceptance and ARSE treatment as separate Niger project gates. Do not rely on China GB/T grid certificates alone. Prepare IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence, a Niger-specific firmware/protection profile, and commissioning records for the exact inverter model before committing the equipment to a grid-tied Niger project.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将NIGELEC接入验收和ARSE处理视为尼日尔项目的独立门槛。不要仅依赖中国GB/T并网证书。针对具体逆变器型号，在投入尼日尔并网项目之前，应准备IEC 62116和IEC 61727证据、尼日尔专用固件/保护配置及调试记录。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將NIGELEC接入驗收和ARSE處理視為尼日項目的獨立門檻。不要僅依賴中國GB/T併網證書。針對具體逆變器型號，在投入尼日併網項目之前，應準備IEC 62116和IEC 61727證據、尼日專用韌體/保護配置及調試記錄。

requirement_topic.en: Off-Grid and Mini-Grid Solar — IEC TS 62257 / VeraSol Evidence, ARSE Treatment, and Donor Specifications
requirement_topic.zh: 离网和微电网太阳能——IEC TS 62257 / VeraSol证据、ARSE处理和捐助方规格
requirement_topic.zht: 離網和微電網太陽能——IEC TS 62257 / VeraSol證據、ARSE處理和捐助方規格

summary.en: Niger has a strong off-grid and mini-grid solar use case because electrification is low and many rural loads are far from the NIGELEC network. For isolated PV inverter systems and mini-grids, the practical acceptance package is often driven by project documents from the government, ARSE, rural electrification agencies, World Bank, AfDB, IFC, or other donors. IEC TS 62257 is the core international reference for small renewable-energy and hybrid rural electrification systems, and VeraSol quality-assurance requirements may be specified for off-grid appliances or solar-home-system equipment. Inverters must also be sized and derated for Sahel heat, dust, weak maintenance conditions, and battery/hybrid operation.
summary.zh: 由于尼日尔电气化水平低，许多农村负荷远离NIGELEC电网，离网和微电网太阳能具有重要应用场景。对于独立光伏逆变器系统和微电网，实际验收包通常由政府、ARSE、农村电气化机构、世界银行、非洲开发银行、IFC或其他捐助方的项目文件决定。IEC TS 62257是小型可再生能源及混合农村电气化系统的核心国际参考，离网电器或太阳能户用系统设备也可能要求VeraSol质量保证。逆变器还须针对萨赫勒高温、沙尘、维护条件薄弱及电池/混合运行进行容量选择和降额。
summary.zht: 由於尼日電氣化水平低，許多農村負荷遠離NIGELEC電網，離網和微電網太陽能具有重要應用場景。對於獨立光伏逆變器系統和微電網，實際驗收包通常由政府、ARSE、農村電氣化機構、世界銀行、非洲開發銀行、IFC或其他捐助方的項目文件決定。IEC TS 62257是小型可再生能源及混合農村電氣化系統的核心國際參考，離網電器或太陽能戶用系統設備也可能要求VeraSol品質保證。逆變器還須針對薩赫勒高溫、沙塵、維護條件薄弱及電池/混合運行進行容量選擇和降額。

standards_or_laws: IEC TS 62257 series — Recommendations for renewable energy and hybrid systems for rural electrification
VeraSol quality assurance framework — commonly referenced for off-grid solar product quality where project specifications require it
ARSE and Niger rural-energy project approval or licensing requirements where mini-grid electricity service is regulated
World Bank / AfDB / IFC project specifications for Niger solar, mini-grid, or energy-access programmes where applicable

summary.en: China-side inverter evidence is usually centred on grid-connected PV standards such as GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964. These are not designed as a complete off-grid rural electrification acceptance package. Chinese factory test reports may demonstrate inverter efficiency, battery compatibility, and environmental operation, but Niger off-grid projects may require IEC TS 62257-aligned system design evidence, donor quality-assurance documentation, field-service plans, spare-parts availability, and operation in high ambient temperature and dust.
summary.zh: 中国侧逆变器证据通常围绕GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964等并网光伏标准，并非完整的离网农村电气化验收包。中国工厂测试报告可证明逆变器效率、电池兼容性和环境运行能力，但尼日尔离网项目可能要求符合IEC TS 62257思路的系统设计证据、捐助方质量保证文件、现场服务计划、备件可用性，以及高环境温度和沙尘条件下运行证据。
summary.zht: 中國側逆變器證據通常圍繞GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964等併網光伏標準，並非完整的離網農村電氣化驗收包。中國工廠測試報告可證明逆變器效率、電池相容性和環境運行能力，但尼日離網項目可能要求符合IEC TS 62257思路的系統設計證據、捐助方品質保證文件、現場服務計畫、備件可用性，以及高環境溫度和沙塵條件下運行證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)

gap.en: Gap: A China grid-connected inverter certificate does not prove suitability for Niger off-grid or mini-grid service. Exporters should prepare IEC TS 62257-oriented system documentation, battery and hybrid-controller compatibility evidence, islanded-mode protection settings, black-start and load-step test evidence, dust/heat derating curves, service and spare-parts plans, and any VeraSol or donor-specific quality documentation required by the tender. Confirm ARSE and local concession or licence treatment before offering electricity service through a mini-grid.
gap.zh: 差距：中国并网逆变器证书不能证明其适合尼日尔离网或微电网服务。出口商应准备符合IEC TS 62257思路的系统文件、电池及混合控制器兼容性证据、孤网模式保护设置、黑启动和负荷阶跃测试证据、沙尘/高温降额曲线、服务及备件计划，以及招标要求的任何VeraSol或捐助方专用质量文件。在通过微电网提供售电服务前，应确认ARSE及当地特许经营或许可处理。
gap.zht: 差距：中國併網逆變器證書不能證明其適合尼日離網或微電網服務。出口商應準備符合IEC TS 62257思路的系統文件、電池及混合控制器相容性證據、孤網模式保護設置、黑啟動和負荷階躍測試證據、沙塵/高溫降額曲線、服務及備件計畫，以及招標要求的任何VeraSol或捐助方專用品質文件。在通過微電網提供售電服務前，應確認ARSE及當地特許經營或許可處理。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but often mandatory in practice for donor-financed off-grid or mini-grid projects; ARSE or concession treatment may be mandatory where electricity service is regulated
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T grid-connected inverter documentation is not an off-grid or mini-grid rural electrification approval package

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Niger off-grid and mini-grid projects, treat IEC TS 62257-style system evidence, donor quality requirements, field-service capacity, and ARSE/concession treatment as separate from China grid-inverter certification. Confirm VeraSol or other quality-assurance clauses in the tender before selecting the inverter family.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于尼日尔离网和微电网项目，应将IEC TS 62257式系统证据、捐助方质量要求、现场服务能力和ARSE/特许经营处理视为独立于中国并网逆变器认证的要求。在选择逆变器系列前，请确认招标文件中的VeraSol或其他质量保证条款。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於尼日離網和微電網項目，應將IEC TS 62257式系統證據、捐助方品質要求、現場服務能力和ARSE/特許經營處理視為獨立於中國併網逆變器認證的要求。在選擇逆變器系列前，請確認招標文件中的VeraSol或其他品質保證條款。
